ddt:Target.Name: CVT_H45_M4R_FK0_v2.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Initial create: The ECU is based on 25953NDS07[N]. 2003/10/02 NISSAN KR6 Y.Watanabe Modified all contents to depend on the naming rule. 2006/07/14 NISSAN XX4 K.Konishi Modified some bugs which don't meet the naming rule. 2006/07/29 NISSAN XX4 K.Konishi <<2.06>> 2006/12/26 Add DTCs (P0641, U1010)
Sec XX4 Y.Watanabe wata-yoshi@mail.nissan.co.jp
2007.1.30 Nissan XX4 Y.Watanabe Modified DTC data. Deletion "1t" data at specific fault
2007.4.10 Nissan XX4 Y.Watanabe Modification of ECU name Addtion of Auto-identification
2008/3/10 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida Modification of CAN DIAG SUPPORT MNTR.can Unused data was deleted. NissanIdentification data was modified. NISSAN N1>>N1 Type Of Fault valu data was added. >>>valu 0 Standard. [[2.17]]
2008/3/12 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida Unused device spece was deleted. [[2.17]]
2011/11/25 RSM Doojin Park Modified for use as H45 M4R FK0 xml.
2013/02/06 RSM Dongseok Kim Revision of Data Tab
2013/03/20 RSM Dongseok Kim add recording data delete unused data add screen [Clear EEPROM] modify screen [Identification]

Item.Text: Primary pulley revolution speed sensor failure
Secondary pulley revolution speed sensor failure
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or short circuit to ground
Open circuit or short circuit to power supply

Device.Name: Primary pulley revolution speed sensor failure
Secondary pulley revolution speed sensor failure

Label.Text: Clear EEPROM after replacing TCU or CVT assembly
If TCU is replaced with used unit or CVT assembly is replaced with new or used unit, Follow the instructions below for EEPROM clear.
4. Rlease brake pedal and accelerator pedal
3. Click "EEPROM Clear" button while depressing the brake pedal with the left foot and the accelerator pedal slightly with the right foot (accelerator pedal angle : approximately 2/8)
2. Shift the selector lever to "R" position
5. Turn the ignition switch "OFF" and hold it for 10 seconds or more while keeping the selector lever in "R" position
6. Turn the ignition switch "ON" while keeping the selector lever in "R" position
7. Set the selector lever to "P" position and Check that the shift position in combination meter turns ON
Then you can see that 6 monitoring values in the list below are immediately changed to "0"
Now you can see that the above 6 data are changed to new values
